expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(DATOS_ADICIONALES), '')), LOWER('BPS'))) THEN 'BPS  ' WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(DATOS_ADICIONALES), '')), LOWER('DGI'))) THEN 'DGI  ' ELSE 'Otros' END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.IDF_PERS_ODS END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.MESID END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.AAAAMM END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) THEN NULL ELSE 0 END)

CAST((CONCAT((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(AAAAMM AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')), ';', (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(IMPORTE_ARBITRADO_DOLARES AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990.00')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', ',')))) AS STRING)

metadata.label: Pipeline break - write to next part

condition.expression: ((((CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(SUB_TIPO_PRODUCTO_COMERCIAL), '')), LOWER('Corporativa'))) OR (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(SUB_TIPO_PRODUCTO_COMERCIAL), '')), LOWER('Pyme')))) AND (BLOQUEO_DURO_CONTRATO = FALSE)) AND (BLOQUEO_DURO_TARJETA = FALSE))

expression.expression: (FIRST_VALUE(FECHA_ACTIVACION) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST))
(FIRST_VALUE(FECHA_PRIMERA_TRANSACCION) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST))
(FIRST_VALUE(FECHA_ULTIMA_TRANSACCION) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST))

CAST((CONCAT('Cantidad de Tarjetas con Consumo: ', (CASE WHEN ((CANTIDAD_TARJETAS_CON_CONSUMO IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(CAST(CANTIDAD_TARJETAS_CON_CONSUMO AS STRING))) = 0)) THEN 0 ELSE (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(CANTIDAD_TARJETAS_CON_CONSUMO AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) END))) AS STRING)

CAST((CONCAT('Cantidad transacciones mes: ', (CASE WHEN ((CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(CAST(CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES AS STRING))) = 0)) THEN 0 ELSE (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) END))) AS STRING)

CAST((CONCAT('Cantidad transacciones 3 meses: ', (CASE WHEN ((CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES_3MESES IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(CAST(CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES_3MESES AS STRING))) = 0)) THEN 0 ELSE (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES_3MESES AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) END))) AS STRING)
CAST('# empleados en Santander' AS STRING)

CAST(concat('Fecha Alta: ', regexp_replace(regexp_replace(format_number(CAST(day(TO_TIMESTAMP(FECHA_ALTA_CONTRATO)) AS DOUBLE), 0), ',', '__THS__'), '__THS__', ''), '-', regexp_replace(regexp_replace(format_number(CAST(month(TO_TIMESTAMP(FECHA_ALTA_CONTRATO)) AS DOUBLE), 0), ',', '__THS__'), '__THS__', ''), '-', regexp_replace(regexp_replace(format_number(CAST(year(TO_TIMESTAMP(FECHA_ALTA_CONTRATO)) AS DOUBLE), 0), ',', '__THS__'), '__THS__', '')) AS STRING)
CAST((CONCAT('Tipo tarjeta: ', (CASE WHEN (ES_TITULAR = TRUE) THEN 'Titular' ELSE 'Adicional' END))) AS STRING)

CAST((CONCAT('Estado: ', (CASE WHEN ((((BLOQUEO_SOFT_CONTRATO = FALSE) AND (BLOQUEO_DURO_CONTRATO = FALSE)) AND (BLOQUEO_SOFT_TARJETA = FALSE)) AND (BLOQUEO_DURO_TARJETA = FALSE)) THEN ' Ok' ELSE ' Bloqueado' END))) AS STRING)

CAST((CONCAT('Cantidad transacciones mes: ', (CASE WHEN ((CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(CAST(CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES AS STRING))) = 0)) THEN 0 ELSE (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) END))) AS STRING)

CAST((CONCAT('Cantidad transacciones 3 mes: ', (CASE WHEN ((CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES_3MESES IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(CAST(CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES_3MESES AS STRING))) = 0)) THEN 0 ELSE (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES_3MESES AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) END))) AS STRING)

CAST((CONCAT((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(AAAAMM AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')), ';', (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(MONTO_ARBITRADO_DOLARES AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', ',')))) AS STRING)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.IDF_PERS_ODS END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.MESID END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.AAAAMM END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) THEN NULL ELSE 0 END)
CAST('# empleados en otros Bancos' AS STRING)

CAST((CONCAT('Monto transacciones mes (Arbitrado UYU): ', (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(MONTO_TRANSACCIONES_MES_ACTUAL AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990.00')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', ',')))) AS STRING)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.IDF_PERS_ODS END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.MESID END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.AAAAMM END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) THEN NULL ELSE 0 END)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS_CONTRATO = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS_CONTRATO) AND (in0.NUMERO_CONTRATO = in1.NUMERO_CONTRATO)) THEN in1.CANTIDAD_TARJETAS ELSE NULL END)
((((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) AND (in0.TIPOPAGO = in1.TIPOPAGO))
(CASE WHEN ((((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) AND (in0.TIPOPAGO = in1.TIPOPAGO)) THEN NULL ELSE 0 END)
(CASE WHEN ((((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) AND (in0.TIPOPAGO = in1.TIPOPAGO)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.AAAAMM END)
(CASE WHEN ((((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) AND (in0.TIPOPAGO = in1.TIPOPAGO)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.IDF_PERS_ODS END)
(CASE WHEN ((((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) AND (in0.TIPOPAGO = in1.TIPOPAGO)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.TIPOPAGO END)
(CASE WHEN ((((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.MESID = in1.MESID)) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) AND (in0.TIPOPAGO = in1.TIPOPAGO)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.MESID END)

CAST((CONCAT((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(AAAAMM AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')), ';', (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(MONTO_ARBITRADO_DOLARES AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990.00')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', ',')))) AS STRING)

CAST((CONCAT((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(AAAAMM AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')), ';', (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(CANTIDAD_EMPLEADOS AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')))) AS STRING)

CAST((CONCAT((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(AAAAMM AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')), ';', (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(CANTIDAD_EMPLEADOS AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')))) AS STRING)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) AND (in0.MERCHANT = in1.MERCHANT)) THEN NULL ELSE 0 END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) AND (in0.MERCHANT = in1.MERCHANT)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.AAAAMM END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) AND (in0.MERCHANT = in1.MERCHANT)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.IDF_PERS_ODS END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.IDF_PERS_ODS = in1.IDF_PERS_ODS) AND (in0.AAAAMM = in1.AAAAMM)) AND (in0.MERCHANT = in1.MERCHANT)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.MERCHANT END)

(CASE WHEN ((CODIGO_PRODUCTO = '77') AND (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(UPPER(DESCRIPCION_CRM)), '')), LOWER('SOY')))) THEN 37 WHEN ((CODIGO_PRODUCTO = '77') AND (NOT (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(UPPER(DESCRIPCION_CRM)), '')), LOWER('SOY'))))) THEN 36 WHEN ((CODIGO_PRODUCTO = '80') AND (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(UPPER(DESCRIPCION_CRM)), '')), LOWER('SOY')))) THEN 39 WHEN ((CODIGO_PRODUCTO = '80') AND (NOT (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(UPPER(DESCRIPCION_CRM)), '')), LOWER('SOY'))))) THEN 38 ELSE 99 END)

CAST(concat('Fecha Alta: ', regexp_replace(regexp_replace(format_number(CAST(day(TO_TIMESTAMP(FECHA_ALTA_CONTRATO)) AS DOUBLE), 0), ',', '__THS__'), '__THS__', ''), '-', regexp_replace(regexp_replace(format_number(CAST(month(TO_TIMESTAMP(FECHA_ALTA_CONTRATO)) AS DOUBLE), 0), ',', '__THS__'), '__THS__', ''), '-', regexp_replace(regexp_replace(format_number(CAST(year(TO_TIMESTAMP(FECHA_ALTA_CONTRATO)) AS DOUBLE), 0), ',', '__THS__'), '__THS__', '')) AS STRING)
CAST((CONCAT('Tipo tarjeta: ', (CASE WHEN (ES_TITULAR = TRUE) THEN 'Titular' ELSE 'Adicional' END))) AS STRING)

CAST((CONCAT('Estado: ', (CASE WHEN ((((BLOQUEO_SOFT_CONTRATO = FALSE) AND (BLOQUEO_DURO_CONTRATO = FALSE)) AND (BLOQUEO_SOFT_TARJETA = FALSE)) AND (BLOQUEO_DURO_TARJETA = FALSE)) THEN ' Ok' ELSE ' Bloqueado' END))) AS STRING)

CAST((CONCAT('Cantidad transacciones mes: ', (CASE WHEN ((CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(CAST(CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES AS STRING))) = 0)) THEN 0 ELSE (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) END))) AS STRING)

CAST((CONCAT('Cantidad transacciones 3 mes: ', (CASE WHEN ((CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES_3MESES IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(CAST(CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES_3MESES AS STRING))) = 0)) THEN 0 ELSE (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(CANTIDAD_COMPRAS_TOTALES_3MESES AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) END))) AS STRING)

warehouseQuery.query:
select [core].[dbo].[PRODUCTOS_cuentas_transacciones_13meses].[idf_pers_ods],
	[core].[dbo].[PRODUCTOS_cuentas_transacciones_13meses].[AAAAMM],
	[core].[dbo].[PRODUCTOS_cuentas_transacciones_13meses].[datos_adicionales],
	[core].[dbo].[PRODUCTOS_cuentas_transacciones_13meses].[monto_arbitrado_dolares] 
from [core].[dbo].[PRODUCTOS_cuentas_transacciones_13meses] 
where [core].[dbo].[PRODUCTOS_cuentas_transacciones_13meses].[codigo_tipo_transaccion_cuenta] = '0034' 
	and ([core].[dbo].[PRODUCTOS_cuentas_transacciones_13meses].[datos_adicionales] Like '%PRIFSUUR_BPS       APJ PAGO%' or [core].[dbo].[PRODUCTOS_cuentas_transacciones_13meses].[datos_adicionales] Like '%PRIFSUUR_DGI       IMP PAGO%' or [core].[dbo].[PRODUCTOS_cuentas_transacciones_13meses].[datos_adicionales] Like '%PRIFSUUR_DGI       IMP2PAGO%')

condition.expression: ((((CODIGO_PRODUCTO = '77') AND (CAST(CODIGO_SUBPRODUCTO AS STRING)  IN ('3095' , '3195' , '3097' , '3004'))) OR (CODIGO_PRODUCTO = '80')) AND (CAST(CODIGO_SUBPRODUCTO AS STRING)  IN ('3096' , '3196' , '3098' , '3005')))
((FECHA_ULTIMA_TRANSACCION >= (TO_DATE(CAST((ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_DATE, -3)) AS STRING), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH2424:MI:SS.FF4'))) AND (NOT ((IDF_PERS_ODS IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(IDF_PERS_ODS)) = 0))))

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN ((CANTIDAD_TARJETAS_CON_CONSUMO IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(CANTIDAD_TARJETAS_CON_CONSUMO)) = 0)) THEN '0' ELSE CANTIDAD_TARJETAS_CON_CONSUMO END) AS INTEGER)

CAST((CONCAT('Cantidad de Tarjetas: ', (CASE WHEN ((CANTIDAD_TARJETAS IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(CAST(CANTIDAD_TARJETAS AS STRING))) = 0)) THEN 0 ELSE (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(CANTIDAD_TARJETAS AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) END))) AS STRING)
